title: Pride Collaboration Universe (Full)
description: A pack with Fabric, Optimisation mods and Simple Voice Chat for use in the PCU
body:
A modpack for collaborators in the Pride Collaboraters Univers who are less familiar with modding minecraft and wants to optimise the game, have features known from OptiFine and Simple Voice Chat to partipate in collaborations.

Contains:
**Voice Chat**
Simple Voice Chat - Allows you to voice chat with people in game, in groups or based on proximity

**Optifine Features**
[EMF] Entity Model Features - Allows for resource packs to interact with EMFs
[ETF] Entity Texture Features - Allows for resource packs to interact with ETFs
Continuity - Allows for connected textures
Iris Shaders - Allows for Shaders support
Variants-CIT - Allows resource packs to work with variations through CIT
Zoomify - Adds zoom functionality to the game

**Quality of Life**
Controlling - Adds Keybind Searching
Searchables - Adds more advanced search capabilities
Mod Menu - Adds an options menu for working with installed mods

**Shaders**
Complimentary Shaders - Reimagined
BSL Shaders

And a whole lot of optimisation and library mods.
